pinpoint.apnschannel.ApplicationId.Description: The unique identifier for the Amazon Pinpoint application that the APNs channel applies to.

pinpoint.apnschannel.BundleId.Description: The bundle identifier that's assigned to your iOS app. This identifier is used for APNs tokens.

pinpoint.apnschannel.Certificate.Description: The APNs client certificate that you received from Apple. Specify this value if you want Amazon Pinpoint to communicate with APNs by using an APNs certificate.

pinpoint.apnschannel.DefaultAuthenticati.Description: The default authentication method that you want Amazon Pinpoint to use when authenticating with APNs. Valid options are `key` or `certificate`.

pinpoint.apnschannel.Enabled.Description: Specifies whether to enable the APNs channel for the application.

pinpoint.apnschannel.PrivateKey.Description: The private key for the APNs client certificate that you want Amazon Pinpoint to use to communicate with APNs.

pinpoint.apnschannel.TeamId.Description: The identifier that's assigned to your Apple Developer Account team. This identifier is used for APNs tokens.

pinpoint.apnschannel.TokenKey.Description: The authentication key to use for APNs tokens.

pinpoint.apnschannel.TokenKeyId.Description: The key identifier that's assigned to your APNs signing key. Specify this value if you want Amazon Pinpoint to communicate with APNs by using APNs tokens.
